items.name: Coffee Cruiser
items.description: When you need coffee, make it come to you! Drive around using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys. Hit 'X' to toggle the headlight and 'H' to honk. Click with your mouse to fuel up on coffee yourself so you can keep cruising!
